title: Shared SPL Vault With Per-User Receipts
summary: Implement a paused/unpaused SPL token vault with PDA-backed custody and per-user receipt accounting.
businessLogic: An administrator initializes a vault for a single SPL mint with a PDA-controlled token account.
Users deposit tokens into the vault and accrue balances in receipt PDAs keyed by vault and user.
Users withdraw only their own deposited balance, and the admin can pause or resume movement.

instructions.name: initialize
instructions.description: Create vault state, derive the vault authority PDA, and create the custody token account.

instructions.name: deposit
instructions.description: Transfer user funds into the vault and update the user's receipt balance and global totals.

instructions.name: withdraw
instructions.description: Return funds from the vault to the depositing user, signed by the vault authority PDA.

instructions.name: set_paused
instructions.description: Let the admin pause or resume deposits and withdrawals.

invariants: Vault custody must be controlled by a program-derived authority.
Receipt PDAs must be bound to the specific vault and user that owns the balance.
Only the configured admin can pause or resume movement.
Withdrawals must not exceed the stored receipt balance and must return to a token account owned by the withdrawing user.
The vault mint, receipt balances, and global accounting totals must remain internally consistent.
failureConditions: Allowing a user to withdraw from another user's receipt.
Allowing deposits or withdrawals while the vault is paused.
Allowing withdrawals to attacker-controlled token accounts.
Missing mint validation for the vault or user token accounts.
